criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The degree to which the app adapts to individual user needs, preferences, and goals using AI.

criteria.name: AI-powered features
criteria.description: Specific functionalities of the app that are powered by artificial intelligence, such as workout/meal plan generation, progress tracking, and personalized feedback.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: How well the app keeps users motivated and actively participating in lifestyle improvements.

criteria.name: Data Analysis
criteria.description: The app's ability to analyze user data (e.g., activity levels, dietary habits) to provide insights and recommendations.

criteria.name: Adaptability
criteria.description: The app's capacity to adjust workout intensity and provide evolving routines as the user progresses.
